summary: Verified 3 bug fixes for POS system: 1) Cash register calculation now includes orders without shift_id, 2) User permissions (hide_cash_expected, hide_recent_orders) correctly hide UI elements, 3) Thermal printing uses hidden iframe. All 13 backend tests passed, all UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: shifts_routes.py get_cash_register_summary combines shift_id orders + unlinked orders (no shift_id) from same branch/period
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js permission checks at lines 2082 (hide_recent_orders) and 2155 (hide_cash_expected) correctly hide sections
VERIFIED: Cash register close dialog hides 'نقدي' and 'المتوقع' cards when user has hide_cash_expected permission
VERIFIED: Settings.js edit user dialog shows permission toggles for hide_cash_expected and hide_recent_orders in 'الميزات الخاصة' section
VERIFIED: Thermal printing uses hidden iframe with @page { size: 80mm auto; margin: 0; } CSS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test cashier user
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) Cash register summary API correctly combines shift_id orders with unlinked orders. 2) Permission hiding works - cashier with hide_cash_expected sees only 2 cards (Total Sales, Expenses) instead of 4 in cash register dialog, and hide_recent_orders hides 'آخر الطلبات' section from Dashboard. 3) Thermal printing uses hidden iframe. Test cashier currently has both hide permissions enabled.

verified_bug_fixes.description: Cash register close calculation not matching reports - orders without shift_id were not counted
verified_bug_fixes.fix_details: get_cash_register_summary and close_cash_register now query both shift_id orders AND unlinked orders (no shift_id) from same branch/period, then merge with deduplication

verified_bug_fixes.description: User permissions (hide_cash_expected, hide_recent_orders) must hide relevant UI elements
verified_bug_fixes.fix_details: Permission checks using !user?.permissions?.includes('hide_cash_expected') and !user?.permissions?.includes('hide_recent_orders') correctly hide sections

verified_bug_fixes.description: Thermal printing CSS rewrite for 80mm paper width using hidden iframe
verified_bug_fixes.fix_details: Uses hidden iframe with @page { size: 80mm auto; margin: 0; }, fonts changed to Arial/Tahoma, direct printing without popup window

ui_tests.cash_register_dialog_admin: PASSED - shows all 4 summary cards (Total Sales, Cash, Expenses, Expected)
ui_tests.cashier_dashboard_hides_sales_by_payment: PASSED - 'المبيعات حسب طريقة الدفع' section hidden
ui_tests.cashier_cash_register_dialog: PASSED - shows only 2 cards (Total Sales, Expenses), hides Cash and Expected
ui_tests.edit_user_permissions: PASSED - found hide_cash_expected and hide_recent_orders toggles
